title: abutilon haitiense
intro: Abutilon haitiense, also known as Haitian abutilon or velvet leaf, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Abutilon haitiense include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
